Inspire International ETF [NYSE: WWJD] Lands Morningstar 5-Star Rating
Inspire ETFs Reports Expense Ratio Reductions for 7 Funds

holdings.infoBox: WWJD is an equity ETF with a total of 223 individual holdings. The top holdings are STMicroelectronics stock at 1.10%, Infineon Technologies AG at 0.99%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 0.94%, Renesas Electronics at 0.92%, and NXP Semiconductors at 0.74%.

overview.description: The Inspire International ETF (WWJD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Inspire Global Hope Ex-US index. The fund offers exposure to equity in large firms outside the US, screened for biblical values per the index provider and weighted equally. WWJD was launched on Sep 30, 2019 and is issued by Inspire.
